title: Removing Consecutive Duplicates from a String

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: A string consisting of lowercase English alphabets and spaces. The string may contain duplicate letters consecutively.
statement.outputFormat: The input string with consecutive duplicate letters removed.
statement.notes: The output string should contain the letters in the same order as the input string.

testCases.input:
5
h e l l o  w o r l d
